response: The serum and FF levels of 25OH-VD, as well as the FF levels of TNF-α and TAC, were determined using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits according to the manufacturer's instructions. These measurements were performed using a 96-well microplate ELISA reader (Dynatech. MR 7000). The 25-OHVD level was measured using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab213966, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) with a quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (16). The TNF-α level was measured using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab46087, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) with the same technique (17). The TAC level was measured using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab65329, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) with the same technique (18).
